steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student is surprised by differences in unit sales. The answer must show the biggest gap between two systems — the most striking disparity in the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Game & Watch (~18.6M) vs. ColecoVision (~2M)': a roughly 9× gap — by far the largest disparity in the table. ✓
  • Choice B: compares systems with a much smaller gap (~4M vs. ~3M) — not particularly surprising. ✗
  • Choice C: also a small gap (~4M vs. ~3M) — not a standout difference. ✗
  • Choice D: mismatches the table values for MSX and Intellivision. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
